description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a flat roof and a prominent central vertical glass panel adorned with abstract black patterns. The facade is a mix of white and dark gray panels, accented by minimalist linear elements and subtle decorative motifs. Large, floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the front and rear, allowing for ample natural light, while the sides feature smaller circular and rectangular windows. The upper level is bordered by sleek metal railings, creating a rooftop terrace accessible via exterior stairs. The entryway is recessed, with a set of steps leading to double doors beneath a decorative overhang. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on symmetry and visual contrast.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large abstract-patterned glass panels, and a mix of white and dark gray exterior panels. Features include a rooftop terrace, prominent windows, and a recessed entryway with steps.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large abstract-patterned glass panels, and decorative motifs on the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting circular windows, a large rear window, and the rooftop terrace with metal railings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying another large abstract-patterned glass panel, a secondary entrance or large window, and a prominent overhang.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with circular windows, exterior stairs, and a clear view of the rooftop terrace and railings.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with abstract patterns, circular side windows, and symmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with double doors, steps, and a decorative overhang, flanked by large patterned glass panels
